GRANTSVILLE CITY
NOTICE OF ANNUAL MEETING SCHEDULES
The public is hereby given notice in accordance with Utah State Code §52-4-202, Public Notice of
Meetings, that the Grantsville City Council will hold its regular meetings on the first and third
Wednesdays of each month at the Grantsville City Offices, 429 East Main Street, Grantsville, Utah and
electronically via Zoom. The meetings start at 7:00 pm unless otherwise noticed.
